productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Rakuni Move Casual Shoes
description: For those who love ultra cool moves, this Rakuni Move shoes from adidas makes for a fabulous buy. With a sleek silhouette and clean design, it's a great shoe for those who love those long drives and stylish clothing.UpperSynthetic leather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfootLacing system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves, textured and adiWEAR with Torsion system for absolute durability and gripShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
